# Fixture Template — `base.fixture.ts`

Place file at: `playwright/fixtures/base.fixture.ts`

## Base Fixture (auth + page objects injected)

```typescript
import { test as base, type Page } from '@playwright/test';
import path from 'path';

// ── Auth state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Generated by global-setup.ts (OIDC login → saves to playwright/.auth/user.json)
export const STORAGE_STATE = path.join(__dirname, '../.auth/user.json');

// ── Fixture type definitions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Add one entry per page object you want injected into tests.
// Example: extend with {Feature}Page for feature-specific fixtures.
type BaseFixtures = {
  authenticatedPage: Page;
};

// ── Base fixture ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const test = base.extend<BaseFixtures>({
  // All tests run with authenticated storage state by default.
  // Use { storageState: undefined } in playwright.config.ts projects that need unauthenticated tests.
  authenticatedPage: async ({ page }, use) => {
    await use(page);
  },
});

export { expect } from '@playwright/test';
```

## Feature-Scoped Fixture (extend base)

```typescript
// playwright/fixtures/{feature}.fixture.ts
import { test as base, expect } from './base.fixture';
import { {Feature}Page } from '../pages/{Feature}Page';

type {Feature}Fixtures = {
  {feature}Page: {Feature}Page;
};

export const test = base.extend<{Feature}Fixtures>({
  {feature}Page: async ({ page }, use) => {
    const featurePage = new {Feature}Page(page);
    await featurePage.goto();
    await use(featurePage);
  },
});

export { expect };
```

## Usage in spec (with feature fixture)

```typescript
import { test, expect } from '../fixtures/{feature}.fixture';

test('AC1: should display list @smoke', async ({ {feature}Page }) => {
  await {feature}Page.expectRowCount(2);
});
```

## Global Setup (OIDC auth)

```typescript
// playwright/global-setup.ts
import { chromium, type FullConfig } from '@playwright/test';

async function globalSetup(config: FullConfig) {
  const { baseURL } = config.projects[0].use;
  const browser = await chromium.launch();
  const page = await browser.newPage();

  await page.goto(`${baseURL}/login`);
  await page.getByTestId('username-input').fill(process.env.E2E_USERNAME!);
  await page.getByTestId('password-input').fill(process.env.E2E_PASSWORD!);
  await page.getByTestId('login-button').click();
  await page.waitForURL('**/dashboard**');

  // Save auth state — reused by all tests (no re-login needed)
  await page.context().storageState({ path: 'playwright/.auth/user.json' });
  await browser.close();
}

export default globalSetup;
```

## `playwright.config.ts` (full reference config)

```typescript
import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';
import { STORAGE_STATE } from './playwright/fixtures/base.fixture';

export default defineConfig({
  testDir: './playwright/e2e',
  fullyParallel: true,
  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,

  // ── Reporters ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // playwright-output skill reads: test-results/results.json, junit.xml, playwright-report/
  reporter: [
    ['html', { outputFolder: 'playwright-report', open: 'never' }],
    ['json', { outputFile: 'test-results/results.json' }],
    ['junit', { outputFile: 'test-results/junit.xml' }],
    ['list'],
  ],

  use: {
    baseURL: process.env.BASE_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000',
    storageState: STORAGE_STATE,
    trace: 'on-first-retry',
    screenshot: 'only-on-failure',
    video: 'on-first-retry',
  },

  // ── Projects ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  projects: [
    // Auth setup — runs once before all tests
    {
      name: 'setup',
      testMatch: '**/global-setup.ts',
    },
    // Browser projects depend on setup
    {
      name: 'chromium',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Chrome'] },
      dependencies: ['setup'],
    },
    {
      name: 'firefox',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Firefox'] },
      dependencies: ['setup'],
    },
    {
      name: 'webkit',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Safari'] },
      dependencies: ['setup'],
    },
  ],

  // ── Output paths ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  outputDir: 'test-results/',

  globalSetup: './playwright/global-setup.ts',
});
```

## Rules

- `storageState` is always set via `STORAGE_STATE` constant — never hardcode the path
- Auth credentials come from `E2E_USERNAME` / `E2E_PASSWORD` env vars — never commit them
- The three reporters (`html`, `json`, `junit`) are mandatory — `playwright-output` skill reads all three
- Feature fixtures extend `base.fixture.ts`, not `@playwright/test` directly
